violations.text: The door in cafeteria is not tight fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of pests by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024
The door in cafeteria is not tight fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of pests by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024
Sneeze guard observed in poor repair (cracked). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

Prepped chili (uncooked) was observed received at 58 degrees Fahrenheit. Facility of origin was called during time of inspection, foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The door in cafeteria is not tight fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of pests by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024
Sneeze guard observed in poor repair (cracked). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/ capacity for the amount of food prepared and served. Additional refrigeration is needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
The door in cafeteria is not tight fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of pests by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024
Sneeze guard observed in poor repair (cracked). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity for the amount of food prepared/served. Additional commercial refrigeration is needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment for cold food storage. Milk Chest was observed being used for cold holding of food. Establishment shall not use milk chest for food storage. Freezer observed is not designed for commercial use. Establishment shall have enough proper commercial refrigeration to hold all cold/frozen foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

Establishment does not have a 3 bay sink or a mechanical dish machine. Establishment needs a variance letter approved by RIDOH. or establishment needs to add a 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

4-101.19 Nonfood-Contact Surfaces. NonFOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other FOOD soiling or that require frequent cleaning shall be constructed of a CORROSION-RESISTANT, nonabsorbent, easily cleanable and SMOOTH material. Kitchen cabinets are constructed of wood. Walls in kitchen are constructed of painted cinder block. Cabinets and walls no longer meet food code standards. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Sneeze guard at hot holding service station was observed broken. Sneeze guard needs to be repaired or replace. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The countertop in the kitchen at the hand washing/ food prep sink area is in poor repair. Counter was observed torn and had exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
